P2 buyer-trust/design gap found: public demo displayed raw-ish audit identifiers and a generic proof-page narrative. Fixed with demo-safe audit metadata formatting, explicit public-demo safety boundary, refreshed buyer-demo page design, updated smoke coverage, GitHub Actions deployment run 27735942871, and live desktop/mobile verification.

P2 buyer-demo/design gap found: route passed API smoke but lagged the redesigned proof-lab standard, displayed raw-ish input hash copy, and title research normalized OpenText xPression casing incorrectly. Fixed page shell, demo-safe plan evidence, OpenText xPression casing, and regression coverage; pending deploy verification.
Family: interactive proof template. Slow reachability returned HTTP 200. Covered by representative Playwright template regression.
